title: Deep-tech ownership
evidence: In-house physics modelling, systems engineering, solver adapters, synthetic validation packs and audit-ready source handover artefacts.

title: Modular indigenous platform
evidence: Lifecycle twin framework combining engineering simulations, telemetry, analytics, 3D visualization and deployment blueprints for on-prem, cloud or hybrid operations.

title: Deeptech domain breadth
evidence: Structural, CFD, HF/LF EM, optics, photonics, systems engineering, functional safety and model-based embedded code are represented as first-class traceable domains.

title: Automation, customization and security
evidence: Role-aware APIs, secure architecture controls, data-protection hooks, vulnerability lifecycle and customizable operator workflows.

title: GPU-scalable solver workflows
evidence: Parallel solver execution is extended to mesh preparation, parametric sweeps, reduced-order generation and post-processing on HPC/GPU queues.

title: Predictive maintenance and operations
evidence: Physics-preserving projection ROMs and validated surrogates feed remaining-useful-life, anomaly and mission-readiness predictions.

title: Chip-aware system analysis
evidence: Bidirectional exchange between semiconductor, board, thermal, RF and platform-level simulations with traceable fidelity assumptions.

title: Electronics reliability
evidence: Multiphysics reliability qualification covers thermal cycling, vibration exposure, derating, power transients and component RUL.

title: Mechanical-optical coupling
evidence: Aero-thermal-structural loads are coupled into optical pointing, line-of-sight, clarity and photonics performance envelopes.

title: Mission-level EW dynamics
evidence: Time-dynamic scenario engine supports synthetic tri-service mission trade studies, sensor behaviour and operational intelligence assessment without sensitive tactics.

title: Native scenario computation engine
evidence: Scenario calculations interoperate with multiphysics solvers for EM, optics, photonics, fluids and structures to preserve first-principles consistency.

title: Data, microservices, 3D and HPC
evidence: Heterogeneous data orchestration, containerized pipelines, advanced 3D context and on-prem HPC deployment are visible as modular platform layers.

title: Open APIs and solver front end
evidence: REST-facing adapters integrate open-source and third-party solvers while exposing a unified GUI for operators and analysts.

title: Layered service-oriented architecture
evidence: Data ingestion, knowledge representation, simulation orchestration, integration, analytics and decision layers are separated for scalability and fault tolerance.
